name: eventgear
description: B2B equipment rental platform for large live events

scripts.dev: pnpm dev:setup && concurrently --names api,web --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter @eventgear/api dev" "pnpm --filter @eventgear/web dev"
scripts.dev:setup: docker compose up -d && pnpm dev:env && pnpm --filter @eventgear/db seed
scripts.dev:env: [ -f apps/api/.env.local ] || cp apps/api/.env.local.example apps/api/.env.local && [ -f apps/web/.env.local ] || cp apps/web/.env.local.example apps/web/.env.local
